name: SkonaDesk
description: SkonaDesk is a self-hosted remote desktop management server built on RustDesk OSS. It provides address books, device groups, active session monitoring, brute-force protection, and JWT relay auth — without a RustDesk Pro licence. Designed for homelab and SME use with a single-command install.

notes.text: Admin credentials are set interactively during installation — you are prompted for a username and password.
Open firewall ports on the host: 21114/TCP (API), 21115-21119/TCP, and 21116/UDP. RustDesk clients will not connect without these.
Configure RustDesk clients via the Server page of the dashboard — it provides a one-click config file download and platform-specific setup commands.
